$comment: D-PP-ELIFDEF-ELIFNDEF (C23 6.10.1) runtime witness -- the #elifdef/#elifndef chain. FEATURE_B defined, FEATURE_A/FEATURE_C undefined. `#elifdef FEATURE_B` is TAKEN (pick=42); the later `#elifndef FEATURE_C` has a TRUE condition (!defined(C)) but MUST stay dead by the taken-once latch. `pick` is a pre-declared var REASSIGNED per arm (never redeclared): a both-arms-fire latch regression yields a distinct exit 3 (last assignment wins), NOT a redeclaration compile error that would mask it. THE PRE-FIX SILENT MISCOMPILE: with #elifdef/#elifndef unrecognized, both are silently consumed inside the dead #ifdef group and control falls to #else -> pick=3 -> exit 3, NO compile/link error. correct -> pick=42 -> exit 42. pick reaches identity() as a function argument (fold-resistance); the release arm runs the shipped pipeline over the same source.
